# public/robots.txt
User-agent: *
Disallow: /hol/
# Allow the landing page to be indexed as a "here's what exists" signpost, not the content itself:
Allow: /hol/$

# Sitemap index (auto-generated by EmDash — points to per-collection sitemaps)
Sitemap: https://huuloc.com/sitemap.xml
# Static routes the CMS doesn't know about (Room of Requirement, Trương, Hogwarts, etc.)
Sitemap: https://huuloc.com/sitemap-static.xml
